purpose: No-secret pilot acceptance matrix for exercising the public LuxVeritas.media MVP before public release.
acceptanceRule: Every required scenario must have a route, trigger or selector, expected evidence, and at least one QA command. Final public release still requires Privacy and Terms approval plus fresh pilot write evidence.

scenarios.label: Home access request
evidence: Browser flow opens request form and receives accepted capture response.
Live form matrix covers /index.html request intent.
Operator report includes access_review in intake queue summaries when requests exist.

scenarios.label: Membership waitlist
evidence: Membership CTA opens the fan form with member defaults.
Private reporting shows Membership Waitlist queue pressure.
Future workflow recommendation can prioritize membership follow-up from real demand.

scenarios.label: Creator submission
evidence: Submission capture stores legal version IDs and reviewed consent values.
Private workflow field map includes submission review fields.
Operator reporting can surface Submission Review queue demand.

scenarios.label: Music player
evidence: Listen, Watch, and Radio controls select approved media sources.
Playback lifecycle reports play, pause, milestones, and ended values.
Live media source QA confirms approved audio, video, and radio source URLs.

scenarios.label: SPMVP release hub
evidence: SPMVP page offers listen, watch, and join paths.
Media follow-up conversion path opens when needed.
Reporting keys remain stable for release, visual, and radio source slots.

scenarios.label: Fan reactions
evidence: Media player reaction buttons record what fans want after listening or watching.
Local signal pass includes reaction history on this device.
Protected operator reporting summarizes fan reaction demand.

scenarios.label: Pilot feedback triage
evidence: Pilot feedback capture stores release-readiness notes through the screened intake path.
Protected operator reporting summarizes pilot feedback count, priority, delivery status, and latest receipt IDs.
Private report exports include pilot feedback rows without exposing secret-shaped values.

scenarios.label: Event access
evidence: Public event page remains invitation/request-access oriented.
Event-specific pages remain public teaser or request-access routes.
Live event matrix covers CTA and reporting events.

scenarios.label: Portal sign-in capture
evidence: Sign-in shell captures screened access requests without account entitlement promises.
Portal fallback button resets after submission or fallback.
Portal access remains noindex and private-shell only.

scenarios.label: Operator reporting
evidence: Unauthenticated report requests are rejected.
Approved operator report returns counts, queue workbench, launch gates, media readiness, and workflow target recommendations.
Private JSON and CSV exports omit secret-shaped values.

scenarios.label: Legal launch gate
evidence: Privacy and Terms pages are drafts, not placeholders.
Launch readiness keeps Privacy and Terms approval as public-release blockers until reviewed.
Final release gate fails without legal approval and write tests.
